h2: Set the stage for memorable moments and expand your livable space with an outdoor wood-burning fireplace.

paragraphs: Set the stage for memorable moments and expand your livable space with an outdoor wood-burning fireplace.

Make a statement in your outdoor oasis as you enjoy the experience of a large, open hearth outdoor fireplace. The Castlewood, one of our most impressive wood-burning fireplaces, combines a stunning 38-inch-tall firebox – with no glass to enhance the views and warmth – and safety-ensured brick construction.

Gather with family and friends around the crackle and aroma of a blazing fire, as you take the chill off evenings and extend the outdoor season. The Cottagewood outdoor fireplace offers an open-hearth experience, enriching your connection to the fire itself and the people around it.

The Villawood outdoor open fireplace provides that snap and crackle you love, with the Heat & Glo quality you depend on. Its masonry look and open-hearth design enhances any deck, patio, or outdoor kitchen, and promises an inviting presence to all those who gather near the open-flame fireplace.
Extend the comforts of your home with a welcoming and warm outdoor space.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
